title: Non-record: 1xH100 auto-research int6 policy sweep
body:
## Summary
This PR adds one non-record folder for a 1xH100 quantization policy sweep under a fixed 10-minute budget.

## Theme
Auto-research on export-time mixed quantization policy via INT6_CATS.

## What changed
- Added policy knob in record script: INT6_CATS
- Logged selected policy per run: int6_policy:...
- Included main run plus extra sweep logs for context

## Main run result
- val_bpb=1.52481100
- bytes_total=13,144,462 (under 16MB)

## Why submit this
This is a structured negative-result submission: on short 1x runs, aggressive int6 export policies can preserve size but create a large quantization gap. The result is useful for pruning dead-end search directions before expensive 8x attempts.

This PR only adds one folder under records/track_non_record_16mb/.
